title.en: In the area outside the Abyss of Destruction, a...

content.en:
In the area outside the Abyss of Destruction, a group of Supremes are coming, and they are constantly fighting against a large number of destructive creatures.

No one knows how many creatures are destroyed, because there has never been such turmoil before, and the abyss turmoil that broke once in the long years before was actually only a small part of the creatures of destruction rushing out.

And these supremes can arrange countless formations in advance to intercept the destructive creatures that break the abyss, at most, only some fish that have slipped through the net and rush out, which will not affect the overall situation.

But now, there is no limit at all, and almost all the creatures of destruction are rushing out.

Therefore, the pressure on these Supremes is too great, and there is no hope of intercepting these destructive creatures, they can only keep killing some destructive creatures, and then try to prevent other destructive creatures from rushing out.

But they also knew very well that this task was very difficult, and they didn't know how many Supremes would have to be sacrificed.

But they can't help it, if they don't stop it, they will have to die if they destroy the creatures and destroy the universe.

Suddenly.

A supreme-level destructive creature rushed into the area of one of the Angel Clan's Supremes and attacked the Angel Clan Supreme frantically.

If it was just a supreme-level destructive creature, this Angel Clan Supreme would not be afraid, but there were a bunch of Dominant-level destructive creatures and Celestial-level destructive creatures around him.

At first, he was able to withstand it.

But only a few minutes later, with an inadvertent moment, the supreme of the angel clan was injured, and the next moment a large number of destructive creatures surrounded him, instantly overwhelming him.

"Ah!!!h

With a burst of screams, the pair of angel wings of this Angel Clan Supreme were directly torn apart, and countless divine blood was scattered in the starry sky.

"Save Me !!"

He cried out, but no one came to his rescue.

It's not that I don't want to save it, but I can't save it.

The number of Supremes is too small, and those Celestial Ones are still coming, and the Lord and the Cosmic God are also mobilizing, but it will take time.

Therefore, the only main force to resist now is the Supremes, but the number of Supremes is so small, and there are so many destructive creatures here.

Therefore, every Supreme needs to face countless destructive creatures, where is the rest of the power to rescue this Angel Clan Supreme?

It didn't take long for the supreme aura of the angel clan to get weaker and weaker, and the injuries became more and more serious.

Suddenly, at a certain moment.

Bang!!!!!

The shockwave covering the many galaxies swept in, annihilating countless destructive creatures, and the space shattered to dust everywhere under the starry sky, leaving only a few seriously injured Celestial-level destructive creatures and the one who was barely too seriously injured.

As for the Angel Clan Supreme, he has long since disappeared.

Just because it was the self-explosion of the Supreme of the Angel Clan just now, the self-explosion before death took the lives of countless destructive creatures, but it still failed to kill that supreme-level destructive creature.

The recovery ability of the supreme-level destructive creature is terrifying, and the means of preserving life are extremely amazing, even the self-explosion of the Supreme of the Angel Clan cannot kill him.

Unless it is a supreme attack like the First Divine Lord, this ordinary supreme-level destructive creature can be killed.

The creatures of destruction were cut into battlefields by the Supremes, and one of them belonged to the Kungo Supreme.

He's here too, to fight the creatures of destruction.

Although the Kunwu Supreme was far away from the Angel Clan Supreme, he also sensed the self-explosion of the Angel Clan Supreme, and couldn't help but sigh secretly: "Another Supreme has fallen!"

Maybe a trace of the soul of the Supreme of the Angel Clan was protected by the treasure, but if it could not be resurrected, it would be equivalent to falling.

And how difficult it is to resurrect the Supreme, even if a trace of soul is preserved, it is as difficult as reaching the sky.

Unless you have a treasure that really protects your life like the first god lord of the god race and the first demon lord of the demon race, you can live, but not every supreme has the luck of the first god lord and the first demon lord.

Therefore, the Supreme of the Angel Clan just now has really fallen.

"Ordinary Heavenly Venerables can't live long on such a battlefield at all, I'm afraid that soon, I will also fall, only those truly top-notch Supremes can save their lives!"

Kungo Supreme thought to himself.

At this moment, a golden light appeared, instantly crossing the battlefield and shattering the lives of countless destructive creatures.

Looking at the corpses all over the battlefield, Kunwu Supreme's pupils shrank.

That attack just now was terrifying, and if it landed on him, it would be enough to annihilate him in an instant.

For this attack, he had some guesses, and with a sweep of his divine sense, he sensed a series of figures.

"Those supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras, they really made a move!"

Kunwu Supreme Secret Path.

And the person who shot just now was the Golden Light Supreme, the Golden Light Supreme can be said to be the strongest person in the Twelfth Universe Era, not much weaker than the Lord of the Yuan Ancients, and its combat power is so terrifying now.

"Ang !!"

The two supreme-level destructive creatures sensed the position of the Golden Light Supreme and other supremes and rushed over.

However, with just two clapped palms, the Golden Light Supreme instantly killed these two supreme-level destructive creatures.

"It's too weak!"

The Golden Light Supreme said a little pretendedly.

"Strike as soon as possible, kill these destructive creatures, and then seal and break the abyss!"

The Lord of the Protogens commanded.

"Got it!"

The Golden Light Supreme and the other Supremes nodded.

With the participation of these terrifying Supremes, the pressure of the Supremes of all races was weakened many times, and they soon advanced the battlefield to the edge of the Abyss of Destruction, with a tendency to drive the creatures of destruction back to the Abyss of Destruction.

But at this moment.

An extremely terrifying aura came from the abyss of destruction, it was a destructive creature with golden eyes, and the aura of destruction on its body was terrifying to the extreme.

"This ......"

Both the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord trembled.

"How could there be such a being in the Abyss of Destruction?"

The First Divine Lord and other supremes were a little incredulous.

In the previous few times of the Abyss Turmoil, such a destructive creature had never appeared!

If such a destructive creature appeared, they would not be able to stop it.

"The King of Destruction has appeared!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu muttered.

"I'll meet him for a while!"

Golden Light Supreme Dao.

Swish!

The Golden Light Supreme rushed over at an extremely fast speed, holding a huge golden seal in one hand, and this golden seal was a top-notch supreme treasure.

"Go!"

The Golden Seal attacked the King of Destruction, and the King of Destruction also grabbed the Golden Seal with one claw.

Boom!

The King of Destruction flew upside down, but the Golden Light Supreme also took a few steps back.

"Worthy of the King of Destruction!"

The Golden Light Supreme was not surprised at all, in the last cosmic epoch in the abyss turmoil, he had also entered the abyss of destruction, awakened several kings of destruction, and was so frightened that he hurried out, otherwise in an environment like the abyss of destruction, he would really fall.

But the real first encounter, still now!

"Lord of the Ancient Ages, how can there be such a destructive creature in the Abyss of Destruction?"

The First Divine Lord asked.

"This is the King of Destruction, inhabiting in the deepest part of the Abyss of Destruction, under the influence of the rules, it has always been asleep, unless someone alarms it, it will wake up, otherwise even if the Abyss of Destruction is turbulent, it will not come out. But this time, it's out! Its strength rivals that of the top destructive creatures, and it is very difficult to kill, and can only suppress the seal!"
